task_description: Implement Phase 16 (World-Class Differentiators - 5 demo-ready features) and Phase 17 (Launch Readiness Gate - full verification and state updates)

verification.summary: All 6 quality gates pass: install (69 projects), typecheck (78/78), build (57/57), test (81/81), lint (67/67), audit (0 high/critical). 5 new differentiator packages created with 45+ meaningful tests. Docker build skipped (no Docker daemon available) but Dockerfiles validated structurally.
